programme.title: Made In America
programme.desc: When Zora Mathews goes searching for her biological, anonymous sperm donor father, she and her Afro-centric mother Sarah are dumbfounded to discover Hal Jackson, an obnoxious used car salesman on late-night TV; and worse than that, he's white.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: The tables turn when a seasoned hostage negotiator takes hostages and risks all to prove his own innocence.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star Part 3
programme.desc: Four players compete in San Jose for the more the $960,000 top prize in the WPT Bay 101 Shooting Star.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown
programme.desc: Six players compete in Hollywood, FL for the $780,000 first-place prize in the WPT Seminole Hard Rock Poker Showdown.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Jacksonville
programme.desc: Six top professional players compete in Jacksonville for the more than $400,000 first-place prize in the WPT Jacksonville bestbet Poker Open.

programme.title: Cool It Carol
programme.desc: Two small-town teenagers move to London's West End and get involved in prostitution and pornography before tiring of big-city life. Starring: Robin Askwith, Janet Lynn, Jess Conrad

programme.title: Frivolous Lola
programme.desc: Lola and Masetto are a young couple about to be married. While Masetto looks forward to make love to his bride-to-be on their wedding night, Lola is reluctant to betroth herself to him without first ensuring that he will be a good lover.

programme.title: The Vampire's Night Orgy
programme.desc: Stranded travelers seek refuge in a remote village, only to discover it's inhabited by vampires with sinister intentions.

programme.title: The Pink Panther 2
programme.desc: Inspector Jacques Clouseau teams up with a squad of international detectives just as bumbling as he is. Their mission: Stop a globe-trotting thief who specializes in stealing historical artifacts.

programme.title: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: His faith broken by years of battle as a crusader, Behmam, a medieval knight, returns to central Europe to find his homeland decimated by the Black Plague.

programme.title: The Big Man
programme.desc: When unemployed Scottish miner Danny Scoular (Liam Neeson) agrees to fight a one-off bare-knuckle bout, he not only risks losing his wife and kids, but enters a hellish domain lorded over by a ruthless Glasgow gang boss.

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal skills and a gambling problem. When he gets in trouble with the mob, he has one last play and it's all or nothing.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In America
programme.desc: Sergio Leone's final film is the epic tale of the life of a Jewish gangster in New York.

programme.title: Urge
programme.desc: A weekend getaway takes a dangerous turn when a mysterious nightclub owner introduces a group of friends to a new designer drug. Stripped of their inhibitions, they start living out their wildest fantasies.

programme.title: If I Can’t Have You
programme.desc: A radio host is targeted by an unknown stalker.

programme.title: Project Ithaca
programme.desc: A group of strangers awaken aboard an alien spacecraft, which is harnessing their terror to power the ship. Divided they will die. Together, they can find a way home.

programme.title: Outpost 11
programme.desc: Set in an alternative past where steam power still rules the world, outpost 11 is the story of three soldiers manning a remote listening post in the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Kill Command
programme.desc: Set in the near future, an elite squad of highly trained marines is sent on a training exercise to a remote island, home to advanced military robots.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Frying Pan into the Fire
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. whips up an outdoor kitchen before hitting the beach in search of the ultimate driftwood bar.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Going for Gold
programme.desc: Joel takes on the mother of all builds – a 20,000-sq./ft. Pennsylvania mansion complete with walk through tree, hand-carved totem pole and 3-story spiral log staircase.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Senegal
programme.desc: We follow travellers in Senegal during the rainy season as they navigate flooded roads and rapids just to get to work.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Somaliland
programme.desc: Due to lack of infrastructure and leftover mines from the civil war, delivery drivers in Somaliland take their lives in their hands each time they cross the dessert.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Gabon
programme.desc: The forests of Gabon are some of the densest and most mysterious in the world. But there are a few adventurous souls who risk it all in this green hell every day. They are the drivers of enormous logging trucks that can carry up to 40 tons of wood.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Congo Kivu
programme.desc: When the Congo gained it's independence it had the best road network in central Africa, but the situation has deteriorated and today only 2% of roads are paved; during the rainy season many parts of the country turn into a muddy bog.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Brazil
programme.desc: Driving tankers loaded with 20.000 pounds of gasoline, these wild men drive on unmapped roads to deliver supplies to illegal gold mines in the heart of the Amazon Jungle.

programme.title: The Human Centipede III (Final Sequence)
programme.desc: An insane prison warden and his sidekick hatch a plan to simultaneously cut costs and deter prisoner revolt in their overpopulated, underfunded jail

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story Of IT
programme.desc: Exploring the 1990 mini-series, based on Stephen King's iconic novel IT, this documentary tells a story heard by few.

programme.title: The Resident
programme.desc: Juliet has found the perfect New York apartment to start her new life. But there are secrets behind every wall and terror in every room as Juliet gets the unnerving feeling that she is not alone. Starring: Hilary Swank, Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Lee Pace

programme.title: Pompeii
programme.desc: As Mount Vesuvius rains down lava and ash, a gladiator (Kit Harington) races to save the woman (Emily Browning) he loves before the city collapses.

programme.title: The Last Legion

programme.title: Snooker 900

programme.title: Rocket Method

programme.title: Snooker 900

programme.title: Cursed Treasures

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Join Historian Dan Jones as he travels back in time to explore Carrickfergus Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: York: Dan explores the history of York's castle, from the Viking Jorvik and the Normans, to the dark days of the anti-Jewish pogrom and the imprisonment of the Knights Templar.

programme.title: Animal Instincts 2

programme.title: Let's Get Laid
programme.desc: A soldier returning from World War II gets mixed up in a series of murders and mistaken identies regarding a cigarette lighter that affects all electric power in this saucy comedy-thriller.

programme.title: Fanny Hill
programme.desc: The erotic and sensual story of a young country girl unwittingly forced into prostitution. Throwing herself, body and soul, into her new work, Fanny derives enormous pleasure from her newfound ability to please.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Jesse and Brandon get in a spirited bidding war after one of them spots a hidden treasure; a savvy newbie enters the fray and steals a prize from the regulars; and Lori and Brandon lock into a hot-ticket item that could net them a small fortune.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our Buyers bid big to win a locker packed with what looks like rare art, but will the winner walk away with cash or counterfeits?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our buyer go head-to-head to score an item that appears to be a covered car. But when the tarp is pulled back, will the winner drive away with a pile of cash or a piece of trash?

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Bids on a covered car are driven up; Dan dings Jesse for a locker loaded with pricey tools, but the latter bounces back for a big score; and the day's final auction gets everyone intensely involved, perhaps too intensely for one.

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our buyers throw down to win a locker packed with recreational equipment and what looks like a hidden tractor. But when the dust settles, and the cover's pulled back, one lucky hunter gets the surprise of a lifetime.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Our buyers are in for the fight of their lives as they lock horns at the nation's biggest shipping container auction.

programme.title: Storage Hunters

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: Jesse knows you don’t strike it big if you play it safe, so he gambles on a safe he hopes will pay off big time. Then, Lori’s fiery bid on a lackluster unit brings out a dragon’s roar from Brandon.

programme.title: Storage Hunters
programme.desc: A deathly bin sends buyers spinning and throws everybody on edge. Then, Brandon and Lori square off against Scott and Chrissy with explosive attacks and counter-attacks. Emotion, rather than strategy, threatens to rule the day.

programme.title: Deadly Women: A Daughter's Revenge

programme.title: Deadly Women: Senseless Slayings
programme.desc: When a person places no value on human life, they can become unstoppable in their twisted missions to destroy the lives around them. These women all pushed boundaries, and shattered lives with their actions.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives. These women all had a fatal fixation.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Nurse Beverley Allitt overdosed multiple infants, Stella Nickell poisoned medicine capsules in stores and Kathleen Follbigg killed four of her own children.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.desc: After rescuing a prisoner from execution by a dictator (guest star Carl Betz), the IMF has to find a hiding place so conspicuous it will be overlooked by police hunting the fugitive on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Death Squad
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF to aid one of its own members when Barney is arrested and marked for execution by a sadistic police chief (guest star Pernell Roberts) on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West
programme.desc: Allen and Ton explain their strategies at a storage auction in San Bernardino, win two units, then have a Pepperbox gun and vintage Lionel train set appraised by experts.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout
programme.desc: 1953 Chevy-inspired bumper car; scores of M16 30-round magazines; reproduction 1940s boardwalk photobooth; aerosol-powered spud gun potato launchers.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Wreck-Shaw
programme.desc: Allen drags a starving Ton to a weekend auction and some newbie buyers try to eat up all the profit. Will a rickshaw, a wrecking ball, and blast detonators be enough to satisfy Ton's appetite, or will the guys go home hungry?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Early Bird Special
programme.desc: Vintage Shooting Star carnival game; professional Mixed Martial Arts octagon fighting cage.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Trading Places

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Catch My Drift?

programme.desc: Rocket Dog's pups Nugget and Beaker get their first lesson in desert survival out on the Manor.

programme.title: Wildest Islands
programme.desc: Islands can be home to the most extreme examples of life, the wildest of people and the most dramatic landscapes. Natural selection fuels evolution in the most dramatic way

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rocket Dog's pregnancy causes problems for Sophie. And rover Lonestar Helps the Aztecs find a new home.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Boot Camp
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today, Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Friends and Neighbors
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Set-Up
programme.desc: The trail is hot and the stakes is high for Dog and the posse. The "Big Fish" in this case is Marco, an alleged drug dealer with a big bond. But a major key to catching him is Elizabeth, who is also a fugitive from the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Searchers
programme.desc: Dog is still on the search for the elusive fugitive, Marco. Dog has been tracking him across Colorado, from Grand Junction to Denver, and now a hot tip that a long time associate of his is hiding in Pueblo sends the team racing south.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Buddha's Delight
programme.desc: Dog and the posse travel to the Big Island to help Leland track down a small-time Bonnie and Clyde couple. Their crime: theft, including allegedly stealing a pair of Buddha statues for resale.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Three's Company
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star
programme.desc: Willie accompanies Kay to a local bingo tournament and gets seduced by the game, eventually embarrassing himself and Kay with his enthusiasm.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice
programme.desc: Willie takes Sadie on a tour of a local college in hopes of convincing her to stay nearby after her impending high school graduation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread
programme.desc: When the Robertson brothers debate which of their wives makes the best cornbread, it escalates into a full-on cornbread cook off. Meanwhile, when Jep, Martin, and Godwin play a practical joke on Uncle Si, it ends up being Si who has the last laugh.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Whole Lotta Bull
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a one-day rodeo fantasy camp where they learn the ins and outs of riding, roping and clowning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Comes the Son
programme.desc: After leaving school to pursue music, Jase feels that Reed needs some structure in his life, so he hires him to take his place at Duck Commander.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bro'd Trip
programme.desc: Jase accompanies Willie on a business trip to Arkansas to pitch a new product and has unorthodox sales strategies. Back in Monroe, Jep and Si have to track down an important item of Willie's that they accidentally shipped out.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Willie thinks his kids have been spending too much time on their phones and other devices so he initiates a "No-Tech Week," but when he has to participate too it ends up being harder than he thought. There's a lice outbreak at Duck Command.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The West Monroe Wing
programme.desc: Willie and Jase run against each other to become president of their neighborhood HOA. Jep, Jess and Miss Kay work on a Duck Commander themed display for the local zoo.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Automation Frustration
programme.desc: Willie buys a 3D printer for the office that starts off as a fun distraction for the guys until it appears the printer could soon replace their jobs. Si is upset that Willie invested in the 3D printer and didn't give him a raise.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Razing the Snakes
programme.desc: Jase, Jep, Si and Cole try to fight back a growing population of cottonmouth snakes on Phil's property. Meanwhile, Willie uses his business expertise to help Rebecca improve her clothing store.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Uneasy Rider
programme.desc: Willie puts Little Will on a budget for his first car but it backfires when Will decides to get a motorcycle instead. Jase and the guys are inspired to design a product using zip lines that will revolutionize duck hunting.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Whose Trash Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Mark's friend is running for public office, and he's a very honest man. But things get out of hand when an opponent tries to win by going after his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Hello and Farewell - Part 1
programme.desc: Jonathan helps Commander Michaels to deal with flashbacks of Vietnam; he also tries to convince her to go to therapy. Mark deals with his fear of flying.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Silent Bell
programme.desc: A pastor must follow a church council's decision to fire most of the staff at the school because they're not Christian.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Reunion
programme.desc: Mark attends his high school class reunion and learns that some memories are bittersweet for his old friends.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Source
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: America's Alien Wars
programme.desc: Has our government been at war with alien aggressors for the past half century? Startling evidence indicates that the US military has been under attack and has kept it from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Global Depopulation
programme.desc: Disasters, famine and pandemics threaten civilisation on a global scale. A cataclysmic event may spell the end of civilisation and the human race could face extinction.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: Documents may prove that the government has a secret group of remote viewers watching its citizens: the CIA's 'psy ops army'.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Secret Government Warehouses
programme.desc: From Fort Knox to Hangar 18 and Camp Hero, discover a series of top-secret and high-security national database centres.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Rise Of The Machines
programme.desc: If technology goes too far, too fast, a time may come when humans are no longer at the top of the evolutionary food chain.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bigfoot
programme.desc: The evidence for Bigfoot piles up, causing some to wonder who has been keeping information from the public.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Anti-Christ?
programme.desc: Every culture and religion on the planet believes that an evil one will usher in the end of days. But who is this Anti-Christ? And how can we hope to stop him?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Top Ten Secret Societies
programme.desc: An elite group of power players may be plotting the fate of the planet. Discover the secrets behind ten powerful hidden organisations around the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Fake World Leaders
programme.desc: Fake World Leaders: Are Hitler, Saddam Hussein and Osama Bin Laden really dead? Experts find proof that several infamous world leaders didn't die when you think they did.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Nazis Today
programme.desc: For decades, there have been rumours key members of Hitler’s inner circle escaped the fall of Berlin - maybe even the Führer himself. But where did they go and what is their plan?

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Bio Hazard Island
programme.desc: A secret government facility may have created many of the diseases currently plaguing the world.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed: Zombies
programme.desc: This episode explores what would happen if a zombie outbreak ever became a reality.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Set-Up
programme.desc: Alexis schemes to prevent Dana from legally adopting Adam's surrogate child; Adam anonymously informs the press of drug problems on Steven's football team; Steven discovers a powerful secret in Dana's past.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Fair
programme.desc: Sean threatens Dana with blackmail unless she helps him gather incriminating information against the Carrington family; Josh Harris is devastated by Sammy Jo's rejection of his wedding proposal; Fallon asks Jeff for a divorce.

programme.title: Dynasty: The New Moguls
programme.desc: After meeting with Cora Van Husen, Krystle obtains a copy of the scandalous video, proving Blake's innocence; Dex discovers Sean is somehow involved with unsavory characters proposing a multi-million dollar oil venture to Denver-Carrington.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Spoiler
programme.desc: Following Josh Harris' death, Sammy Jo realizes she must let go of Steven; upset by Steven's uncompromising use of power, Fallon drifts further away from her brother; Dana gives the notes of Denver-Carrington's board meeting to Sean.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Interview
programme.desc: Sean uses Alexis' bid for governor to gain control of Colbyco; Sammy Jo and Jeff develop a deep friendship from their mutual loneliness; Dana tells Adam he was the father of her aborted baby. As Adams turns to Karen for solace.

programme.title: Dynasty: Images
programme.desc: Krystle discovers damaging information regarding Alexis' marriage to Cecil Colby, Leslie follows Sean to his father's grave, learning his true identity as Joseph Aynders' son; Dana returns to Adam and the two quietly forget the past.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ramon & Paola
programme.desc: Ramon met Paola on Facebook and established an exclusive online relationship. But after many failed attempts to video chat, is she really who he thinks she is? (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lauren & Derek
programme.desc: Lauren met Derek online years ago. Derek is caring, supporting Lauren after she had a baby with a former boyfriend. Lauren thinks Derek could be the one, so why has he avoided meeting her? (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dorion & Jeszica
programme.desc: Dorion is about to give up everything for online love Jeszica, including his relationship with girlfriend Raffinee. But first he wants to know, is Jeszica really the girl in the pictures? (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jen & Skylar
programme.desc: After being bullied in her past, Jen relies on online communities to establish relationships. After meeting Skylar online, they immediately hit it off. But they've never met in person! (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike & Kristen
programme.desc: Mike met Kristen on Facebook. They quickly forged a deep connection, but Mike's frequent efforts to meet Kristen have been futile. Will Mike finally get face-to-face with Kristen? (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jesse & Brian
programme.desc: Jesse met Brian online. They made plans to meet, but Brian stood her up. Now, years later, Brian has asked her to live with him. But, she can't stop wondering - what is Brian hiding? (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Under Pressure

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Faded Love
programme.desc: Kieffer and Jenelle are dating again. Kailyn tries to take Jo to court to change their custody agreement. Chelsea tells her mum about the pregnancy scare. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Fall to Pieces

programme.desc: Derek swaps the chaos of the office for rain-soaked Ripon to collect a 1965 Ford Anglia with just 33,000 miles on the clock. Meanwhile, Dave enjoys the clean lines of a rare Renault Caravelle.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Bangers and Cash

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: An ambulance is sent to a taxi driver who had a head-on crash with a car that was being pursued by the police. Plus, paramedics come to help a woman who fell while walking her dog, and a man who is bleeding from a cut on his leg.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Crews race to a serious motorway accident on the M6 involving a taxi and a young woman is showing worrying signs of sepsis.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance

programme.desc: A young man has a seizure and a police officer is involved in a serious car accident.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Adds It Up/Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: Math, schmath. That's what Sue Ellen thinks… until she runs into a problem her artistic vision can't solve. Sue Ellen can't wait to meet her pen pal in person.

programme.desc: Inspired by Mary Shelley's "Frankenstein," Fern tells a tale so scary that Arthur and the gang become afraid of her! Then, Binky decides to teach D.W. to dance, but she just doesn't seem to get the moves. Is D.W. a no-talent klutz?

programme.title: Arthur: Blabbermouth/All Grown Up
programme.desc: Buster is hurt when he learns his friends don't trust him to keep a secret. Then, the gang finds a mysterious fortune telling game at the library and gets a hint of what their futures could hold.

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Cleats of Strength/Little Miss Meanie
programme.desc: When Francine needs money for new soccer cleats, Muffy hires her as a personal assistant. Lydia and Muffy join forces to defeat a mean beauty queen in the Little Miss Crocus" pageant.

programme.title: Arthur: Fernlets by Fern/Prunella and the Haunted Locker
programme.desc: Muffy talks Fern into writing poems for a new line of greeting cards which becomes the hit of Elwood City, but booming business causes Fern to burn out. Prunella is assigned a new school locker, which is rumored to be haunted!

programme.title: Arthur: Cast Away/The Great Sock Mystery
programme.desc: Arthur is thrilled when Dad invites him to go fly-fishing for the weekend. But a change in plans forces them to include D.W. Find out once and for all where socks disappear to when Baby Kate and Pal team up to solve the great sock mystery.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky's Music Madness/Brain Freeze
programme.desc: Everyone loves the Bang on a Can All-Stars, a funky experimental music group that's touring around Elwood City. Everyone that is, except Binky. A new ice cream shop has just opened up across the block. Will Brain's shop be able to survive?

programme.title: Hitler's Last Secrets: Fatal Liaison - The Strange Affair of Adolf and Eva
programme.desc: The protracted romance between Adolf Hitler and Eva Braun began in 1929 and ended in 1945 in the bunker under the ruins of the Chancellery.

programme.title: The Ultimate History of the Messerschmitt
programme.desc: In this program we look at the development of the Bf 109 which flew in all theaters of conflict in which the Luftwaffe was involved. More Bf 109s were built than any other fighter of the era.

programme.title: Battle for the Bulge
programme.desc: The Battle for the Bulge was the last major German offensive move on the Western Front during the Second World War.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Hitting Back
programme.desc: After surviving the German bombing campaign of British cities, RAF Bomber Command struck back against Germany. The devastating consequences of raids, for both for the young men in the skies and the people on the ground, are portrayed in this film.

programme.title: War Story: Bomber Command: Getting Home
programme.desc: In this film, Bomber Command personnel and a Luftwaffe pilot take the viewer through the frightening reality of fighting in the skies as they try to get a damaged bomber home.

programme.title: War Story: Bomb Girls Remember

programme.title: World War Weird

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Mosquito: The Wooden Wonder

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): State of Shock
programme.desc: After defeating a mysterious group of ninjas at the Emeryville Power Station, the Turtles decode part of a map that they were able to liberate from the would-be thieves.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cry H.A.V.O.C.!
programme.desc: The Turtles get the drop on masked thieves hijacking a jewellery store, only to have themselves arrested for the crime! Before the turtles can be booked, they are rescued by the mutants Amok and Overdrive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): H.A.V.O.C. in the Streets!
programme.desc: Titanus sends of couple of his H.A.V.O.C.mutants to bust into the aerospace plant and steal some much needed equipment. Only problem is that the Turtles were waiting for them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Krakus
programme.desc: Krakus, a cop from the future, arrives and thinking that the Turtles are in league with Titanus, shakes them down for information.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Trek
programme.desc: Krang activates his new dimensional portal, thanks to Shredder's installation of the Energy Transmitter at the Power Relay Station, giving him access to Dimension X.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Unknown Ninja
programme.desc: While watching video tapes of old battles, Raphael sees a mystery person spying on them. While the Turtles investigate, an alien warlord named Dregg sends his TechnoGansters to steal all the gold on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dregg of the Earth
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to let them know that Dregg has landed on Earth and is preparing a press conference. The Turtles rush to meet April at the Park, where they hear Dregg announce his intentions and offers the world his molecular converter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Wrath of Medusa
programme.desc: Believing that the Turtles are the only thing that stands between him and total domination of the planet, Dregg makes contact with Medusa, a sinisterly beautiful alien.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Showdown
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to inform them that all the TV stations in the City are jammed. Sleazebug tries to recruit the Turtles for a martial arts tournament.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Split-Second
programme.desc: Carter, April and the Turtles investigate a break-in at the Antique Timepiece Museum. Convinced that Dregg is responsible, the Turtles discover a clue on a wall display.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Great BMX Race
programme.desc: To help Toad pay off his debt to Fry Guy, Mario and Luigi enter a bike race in hopes to collect the prize money. But what they don't know is that it's all a trap planned by Koopa.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Crimes R Us/Life's Ruff
programme.desc: King Koopa and his evil horde orchestrate the escape of an infamous criminal./The mischievous Koopa Kids Hip and Hop snatch King Windbag's magic wand and zap him and Luigi.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Mario and Joliet
programme.desc: In the Land of Romance, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool, who had been called to the Land of Romance by a friend of Princess Toadstool, are currently trapped in a rapidly crumbling building.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Pirates of Koopa
programme.desc: In Pirate Waters, located in Pirate World, Mario and Luigi are in the middle of peeling potatoes onboard a ship.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: The Venice Menace/Super Koopa
programme.desc: When a gondola suddenly warps into the Mushroom Kingdom, Mario and Luigi discover Venice./Kooky Von Koopa makes a magic pendant that gives King Koopa the power to become Super Koopa!

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Stars in their Eyes
programme.desc: In the depths of space, Mario, Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool are all aboard a yellow spaceship, which is currently traveling through a swarm of flaming meteors.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Love 'em and Leave 'em
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Rotunda Land, which is ruled by the uptight Queen Rotunda. After being caught, Mario unintentionally gets Rotunda to drink a love potion, causing her to fall in love with him, much to his dismay.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Reign Storm/Toddler Terrors Of Time Travel
programme.desc: The Princess goes on her very first vacation to the real world Hawaii. King Koopa and Kooky Von Koopa travel back in time to defeat the Mario Brothers.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Jungle Fever
programme.desc: In the Amazon Jungle, Mario, using a plunger to swat his way through a variety of flora, leads Luigi, Toad and Princess Toadstool in their search for Dr. Sheldon, a mysterious witch doctor.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: The Adventures of Sherlock Mario
programme.desc: In Victoria, Mario and Luigi are riding atop a carriage being pulled by a horse traveling down a street in search of a great detective by the name of Herlock Solmes, with Toad and Princess Toadstool riding in the carriage.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: King Mario of Cramalot
programme.desc: Mario and Co arrive in Cramalot, only to be assualted by Beezos. They are saved by Mervin the magician, who tells them about how Koopa took over Cramalot.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: High Crimes
programme.desc: A woman's life becomes embroiled in a huge military cover-up when it's revealed her husband is not who he says he is.

programme.title: Bedazzled
programme.desc: Elliot Richards is a hapless young man consumed by unrequited love, and desperate to change his life, he makes a deal with the devil who slyly promises to do just that — for a price.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Jacksonville
programme.desc: Six top professional players compete in Jacksonville for the more than $400,000 first-place prize in the WPT Jacksonville bestbet Poker Open.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Jacksonville - Part 3
programme.desc: Three top professional players compete in Jacksonville for the more than $400,000 first-place prize in the WPT Jacksonville bestbet Poker Open.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Championship Super High Rollers - Part 3
programme.desc: Three of the greatest poker players in the world compete for more than $1.3 million at the Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Championship
programme.desc: Six of the greatest poker players in the world compete for $1.2 million at the Bellagio in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Pink Panther 2
programme.desc: Inspector Jacques Clouseau teams up with a squad of international detectives just as bumbling as he is. Their mission: Stop a globe-trotting thief who specializes in stealing historical artifacts.

programme.title: Ghost in the Noonday Sun
programme.desc: In the 17th century, a pirate captain is murdered by his cook after he buries his treasure and marks it on a map but the poor-memory cook must rely on the captain's ghost to re-track the loot, since the map was drawn in disappearing ink.

programme.title: Loophole
programme.desc: When architect Stephen Booker loses his partnership, he finds jobs hard to come by, and with money in short supply, he unwittingly becomes involved in a daring scheme to rob one of London's biggest bank vaults.

programme.title: Wild Card
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a Las Vegas bodyguard with lethal skills and a gambling problem. When he gets in trouble with the mob, he has one last play and it's all or nothing.

programme.title: Odds and Evens
programme.desc: The navy's detective gets his brother, an ex gambler, to help him liquidate an illegal gaming house on a yacht near Miami.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: In this tense action-thriller starring Ray Winstone and Temuera Morrison, Arjan, an ex-soldier, is hired to hunt down a fugitive. But what starts out as easy bounty soon turns into a dangerous game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: If I Can’t Have You
programme.desc: A radio host is targeted by an unknown stalker.

programme.title: Living in Fear
programme.desc: A newly married bride travels to her husband's hometown for the reading of his father's will. When she discovers that the townspeople suspect her husband of a murder committed twenty years ago, she has her doubts about the man she's committed her life to.

programme.title: Til Lies Do Us Part
programme.desc: Starring Paula Trickey, Thomas Calabro, and Al Sapienza. When a popular Philadelphia restaurant critic suspects that her husband is cheating on her, she hires a private investigator who turns out to have his own agenda.

programme.title: Kill Command
programme.desc: Set in the near future, an elite squad of highly trained marines is sent on a training exercise to a remote island, home to advanced military robots.

programme.title: Frank Herbert's Dune: Episode 1
programme.desc: On order of the emperor, Duke Leto Atreides moves his family from his home planet Caladan to another planet, Arrakis, also known as Dune. After an attack on their stronghold, his son Paul and his concubine flee into the desert.

programme.title: Time Runners
programme.desc: Special Agent Sally Biggs has a secret, she can rewind time whenever she wants. It's enough to make her a celebrity at the FBI and allows her to control almost everything in her life... Except for the disappearance of her husband.

programme.title: StarCrash
programme.desc: An outlaw smuggler and her alien companion are recruited by the Emperor of the Galaxy to rescue his son and destroy a secret weapon by the evil Count Zarth Arn. (1978) Starring: Marjoe Gortner, David Hasselhoff, Caroline Munro, Christopher Plummer.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Brazil
programme.desc: Driving tankers loaded with 20.000 pounds of gasoline, these wild men drive on unmapped roads to deliver supplies to illegal gold mines in the heart of the Amazon Jungle.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Congo Katanga
programme.desc: In Katanga, many people are waiting for a train named after a bird, the “Swallow”. More than 2,000 people, three times the train’s capacity, are squeezing in the carriages.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Bolivia
programme.desc: Hundreds of metres above the ground, crisscrossing the valleys of Bolivia, is a network of makeshift cables.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Guyana
programme.desc: The roads in Guyana are treacherous but in one difficult journey taking mining supplies across the forest Roy can earn up twice the average salary.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Congo Kivu
programme.desc: When the Congo gained it's independence it had the best road network in central Africa, but the situation has deteriorated and today only 2% of roads are paved; during the rainy season many parts of the country turn into a muddy bog.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Bangladesh
programme.desc: In Bangladesh, bamboo harvesters raft massive floats through treacherous waters to deliver their payload.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Take to the Trees
programme.desc: Peter may have met his match when he builds a mountainside ski cabin for a client experienced in log-home building.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Beat builds a lottery winner’s 7,000-sq.ft. dream home in northern Alberta. Meanwhile, Peter must beg, borrow and steal to deliver on two high profile entryways for Canada’s Winter Games.

programme.title: The Resident
programme.desc: Juliet has found the perfect New York apartment to start her new life. But there are secrets behind every wall and terror in every room as Juliet gets the unnerving feeling that she is not alone. Starring: Hilary Swank, Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Lee Pace

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Blind Justice
programme.desc: When an airline pilot is framed for drug smuggling, a killer comes to his home to silence him... and the pilot's blind wife (Honor Blackman) is the only witness.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Secret Experiment
programme.desc: After a freak accident while conducting a secret experiment with light refraction, Dr. Peter Brady is transformed into an invisible man.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Crises in the Desert
programme.desc: The British government recruits Brady to go behind lines in the Middle East and rescue one of their top secret agents who has been taken prisoner.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Behind the Mask
programme.desc: Brady helps a horribly disfigured man to become invisible but is soon caught in lies that threaten to destroy the life of a notable politician.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Shadow on the Screen
programme.desc: Peter must board a vessel to rescue a sailor who wants to defect. However, a trap has been set using radar to detect the Invisible Man on a TV screen.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Mink Coat
programme.desc: While vacationing, Peter's sister becomes convinced that the inner-lining of an airplane passenger's fur coat is being used for smuggling purposes.

programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey are assigned to investigate a wife-beating case and discover that the victim's husband is a cop and former classmate of Lacey's. Meanwhile the team also has to find a way to charge a con man after they are forced to let him go.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Informant
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey run into an issue with their drug investigation when it turns out that their teenage informant is a perpetrator of the crimes himself. They are then faced with the dilemma of releasing a one criminal in order to arrest another.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The mind of a female killer is shaped by a complex cocktail of influences. Do people become that way, driven by horrendous events in their lives? Or are some killers born bad?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Killers
programme.desc: They were too young to drink or vote but they were not too young to commit the most brutal of crimes. Some were driven by pure curiosity: how would it feel to take a life?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Betrayed
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her ten-year-old son was missing from his school. When a child of separated parents disappears, investigators first look at the family and divorced parents often suspect each other.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Terror In Disguise
programme.desc: Banks use a variety of devices to discourage would-be robbers: security cameras, silent alarms, and exploding dye packs. But when an elusive bank robber targeted Seattle's banks, none of these precautions were effective.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dixie Mafia
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Threat
programme.desc: A suspected drug dealer would stop at nothing to keep local and federal authorities from building a case against him. When his organization started targeting the government itself, federal agencies went on high alert.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: 911 To Murder
programme.desc: A criminal is released in 1976 to begin a new life as an emergency medical technician. Meanwhile women are being assaulted and killed – in the same neighborhood where the ex-convict works.

programme.title: Very Bad Men: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: A friendly priest is dubbed “Father Feeler” by dozens of young girls, and is finally brought to justice by the women who could not forget their past

programme.title: Very Bad Men: To Kill And Kill Again
programme.desc: In March 1995, one nurse notices the average number of deaths at her Clinton, Indiana hospital has quadrupled over a two-year period. Soon, a male nurse with a sweet bedside manner becomes the centre of an intense police investigation

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mother's Intuition
programme.desc: 14-year-old Pamela Bischoff misses her curfew on April 12, 1991. Though she has only been missing a few hours, her mother, Gail, tells the Oromocto RCMP she is certain Pamela has been raped and murdered by an older boy named Billy Stillman.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Winston's Secret
programme.desc: In April 1996, Winston Malcolm is rescued from icy waters of a lake after a canoe accident. He announced to hospital staff that his wife was with him. A dive team is called to the rescue, and the body of Jan Marshall is finally found a few days later.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Jutta Weber is last seen on August 6, 1997. In August 1999, Don Gazley is arrested and wants to cut a deal: if the police make his charges go away, he’ll tell them where Jutta Weber’s body is. Is Gazley telling the truth?

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Tainted Trust
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Natural Witness
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Vowes
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce  with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murderous Attraction
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Magic Bullet
programme.desc: A hard-working father of two is shot in the head just steps from a notorious strip club. The case is stuck in neutral until Kenda uncovers a conspiracy organized by an unlikely triggerman.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Timothy Peart’s Last Dance
programme.desc: When a teen is killed at a party, police question the guests and wonder if they’re all part of a cover-up.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Kevin recalls a time when he was released from the detention center and his parents throw him a mediocre surprise party.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: The psychiatrist asks Kevin about girls. Kevin describes his first make-out party.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: The doctor's evil twin brother asks Kevin about death and his childhood.

programme.title: Kevin Spencer
programme.desc: Kevin's behavior pushes his original psychiatrist over the edge and his evil twin brother takes his place.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: One Good Fern Deserves Another/The Goodie-Go-Round/Health Feud
programme.desc: Jon mistakenly buys a man-eating fern./Orson tries to get a record player for Bo./Jon becomes a health and exercise nut.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Legend of the Lake/Double-Oh Orson/The Black Book
programme.desc: Garfield lectures a group about a famous water voyage./Orson imagines himself a famous secret agent./Jon gives Garfield his "little black book" to hide.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Binky Gets Cancelled/Show Stoppers/Cutie and the Beast
programme.desc: Binky the Clown loses his show and gets a job fixing up Jon's house./The farm's talent show is disrupted when Orson's brothers show./Nermal thinks it is no longer the "world's cutest kitten."

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: The Lasagna Zone/Sleepytime Pig/Yojumbo
programme.desc: When Garfield has an accident on the new satellite antennae, he ends up in the TV./Orson Can't get to sleep./Jon decides to learn karate.

programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Pros and Cons/Rooster Revenge/Lights! Camera! Garfield!
programme.desc: Garfield sets out to con a con./After an especially cruel trick Orson decides to get even with Roy./Garfield is spotted by famed film director Fredericko Fettucini.

programme.title: On the Case: Heartbreak in the Heartland
programme.desc: A quiet Midwestern community is rocked by a gruesome triple homicide. The unspeakable tragedy robs one man of his mother, grandmother and 5 year old son.

programme.title: On the Case: Deadly Predator
programme.desc: A sexual predator viciously murders a 16 year old girl. Can investigators catch him before he kills again?

programme.title: On the Case: A Drop of Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is murdered at work. Will a single drop of blood lead police to her killer?

programme.title: On the Case: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: A young boy is murdered in his bed in the middle of the night. Police suspect the child's mother. Over the next 9 years there will be accusations, a confession and a conviction but will justice be served?

programme.title: On the Case: A Daughter's Quest
programme.desc: Victoria Baker was born with visual impairments and put up for adoption. When Victoria became an adult, she never imagined that her nearly 10-year-old quest for her biological mother would ultimately involve her in a heartbreaking murder investigation.

programme.title: #Dead2Me
programme.desc: Keith and Ildiko Bettison had been married for decades, with a teenage daughter and an apparently happy life. But when their daughter moved away to university, their relationship imploded into a chaotic world that would end in a brutal murder.

programme.title: #Dead2Me
programme.desc: Tai O’Donnell was a talented musician about to make it big - but his ambitions were cruelly cut short after he met a new girl.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Stepping Hill
programme.desc: An inside look at the series of mysterious deaths that occurred at Stepping Hill Hospital in Stockport, Greater Manchester, in 2011.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Ann Maguire
programme.desc: The tragic story of Ann Maguire, who was stabbed to death by a teenage pupil while teaching a Spanish lesson at Corpus Christi Catholic College in Leeds.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Manchester
programme.desc: The series returns to take a closer look at the most horrific crimes ever committed on British soil, starting with the May 2017 Manchester Arena bombing.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Time to Kill
programme.desc: 17-year-old Sterling Barber was accused of murdering Gerald Douglas Wyatt, a church deacon. The Carnesville, Georgia teenager claimed that he acted in self-defense because Wyatt, known to be a predator, was trying to molest him.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mr. Wonderful
programme.desc: Nicknamed "Mr. Wonderful" by one of his victims, Matt Mathews was everything to the women who lost both their hearts and bank accounts to the prolific con artist. Married at least 11 times, Mathews is believed to have scammed hundreds of people.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadly Secret
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the Kalamazoo, Michigan's cold case unit's investigation of the September 1994 disappearance of Khristine Smith, a seemingly happy wife and mother.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Why Did Josh Kill?
programme.desc: Eight-year-old Maddie Clifton of Jacksonville, Florida went outside to play and never came back. Seven days later a city-wide search led to the home of Josh Phillips, a 14-year-old neighbor, where Maddie's body was found under the boy's waterbed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Imposter
programme.desc: A report about an elusive con man David Pecard, who has taken on more than 20 identities throughout his life of crime. Pecard has infiltrated police departments and top military posts, put criminals behind bars and even posed as a technician.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Family's Shame
programme.desc: The broadcast presents accounts of people who suffer the reality that a close relative has committed murder and endure the struggle between family ties and civic responsibility.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Catalina Island
programme.desc: In 2006, Stephen Williams’ body was found floating off the coast of Catalina Island, the victim of a gunshot wound to the head.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: What do California honeymooners, a surfer in Hawaii, and a toddler in Tennessee have in common? This is what several doctors and the CDC in Atlanta spend months trying to figure out.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: “Brain on Fire” author Susannah Callahan, spent a fortune identifying what was making her ill. After a misdiagnosis, a simple test was administered, and the real source of her ailment was unveiled.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me
programme.desc: Seven Chicago residents died under mysterious medical circumstances. Diagnoses included cardiac arrest, stroke and aneurism. Eventually, a connection is made to all seven victims.

programme.title: My Misdiagnosis
programme.desc: Cathy is first diagnosed with the flu, then with Chronic Fatigue Syndrome. Tamara's bloating and stomach pain do not get better and what she is eventually diagnosed with turns out to be a nightmare.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The God Couple
programme.desc: Oscar grumbles when Felix helps Dani prepare for a choir solo and encourages the group to attend church to support her.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Conscious Odd Coupling
programme.desc: After a heated argument, Oscar and Felix decide it might be best to change their living arrangement and find new roommates.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Pilot
programme.desc: Oscar Madison reluctantly agrees to let Felix Unger, his uptight former college roommate, move in with him after both of their marriages fail.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Ghostwriter
programme.desc: When Oscar is hired to ghostwrite the autobiography of a retired baseball player, Felix offers his "help" by advising Murph to go in a different direction, making Oscar's job more difficult. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Birthday Party
programme.desc: When Oscar realizes he's forgotten Felix's birthday, he pulls together a last-minute surprise party in his honor in an attempt to impress Casey. Dwight Howard guest stars.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Blind Leading The Blind Date
programme.desc: When Dani reveals she's depressed that she'll be the only single one at her high school reunion, Oscar and Felix each put their distinctive dating strategies to work to help her find a boyfriend.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Wedding Deception
programme.desc: When Oscar and Felix attend the wedding of an old college friend, Oscar aims to reconnect with an old flame while Felix is determined to show his ex-wife (guest star Christine Woods) that he's a changed man.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Heal Thyself
programme.desc: Felix's hypochondria kicks into overdrive when Oscar starts dating the most important person in Felix's life - his doctor. Erinn Hayes guest stars as Sharon.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Secret Agent Man
programme.desc: Felix convinces Oscar to appear on a sports television show against Teddy's advice to stick with radio. NFL Network's Rich Eisen and 'Inside the NBA on TNT's' Kenny Smith guest star as themselves.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Unger Games
programme.desc: When Oscar feels threatened by Felix's surprising performance on the softball field and basketball court, they agree to a decathlon to determine which one of them is the better athlete. Geoff Stults guest stars.

programme.title: When Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: When NBA star Andre Emmett is gunned down outside his Dallas home, doorbell footage helps police trace the killer - the motive turns out to be pure greed.

programme.title: When Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: When 16-year-old Ronan Kanda is killed with a ninja sword in Wolverhampton, CCTV and doorbell cameras uncover a chilling tale of teenage revenge and mistaken identity.

programme.title: Voice of a Killer Special: The Colonel
programme.desc: Colonel Russell Williams is one of the deadliest murderers the UK has ever known. Yet, because he committed his crimes in Canada, few people have heard of him. This is his story.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Jason Webster was an undergraduate who became obsessed with mature student, Rebecca love. When Rebecca rejected his advances, he murdered her in a drunken rage.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Buck Ruxton was a well-respected GP and was greatly admired by his patients. But behind his respectable exterior, there lurked a duplicitous and jealous man.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: A bizarre murder case began when police attended the scene of a dog barking outside a camper van. Inside, they found its owner, Tony Robinson, murdered.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Gene Morrison – Fraudulent Forensics Expert
programme.desc: He faked his own credentials and netted $400,000 of taxpayers money, giving bogus court testimony and investigative services.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Carl Hildebrandt – The Dead Con Artist
programme.desc: Hildebrandt faked his own death and stole the identity of a dead child to escape criminal charges before fleeing to Florida.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Robert Hyams – The Suspect Scientist
programme.desc: Hyams posed as a leading scientist and millionaire art buyer before fleeing to California where he posed as a leading academic.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Paul Bint – The Chameleon Con Artist
programme.desc: Dubbed the British Frank Abagnale, Bint committed more than 500 offences including impersonating people.

programme.title: Conmen Case Files: Glenn Rycroft – The Cancer Con Artist
programme.desc: The former air steward who faked cancer and raised hundreds of thousands of dollars from his local community.

programme.title: 72 Hours: Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: In 1998, in a normally peaceful suburb, a pervert on a bicycle appears, performing sexual acts on himself and then attacking teenage girls. For reasons apparent to the residents, they nickname him after the Scottish Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: Murder in the Family: Woody Harrelson
programme.desc: Woody Harrelson's portrayal of a serial killer may have been influenced by his father.

programme.title: The Case: A Crime Too Perfect (Stephane Fournier)
programme.desc: It all started on the night of February 26 to 27, 2012. It was half past midnight when Stéphane Fournier arrived at the forest of Saint Lambert des Bois.

programme.title: The Case: The Treiber Affair
programme.desc: In 2004, a female couple disappears.

programme.title: The Case: The Last Tango (Bertrand Gelineau)
programme.desc: In November 2006, the relatives of Nicole Saada, a woman in her sixties, came to report her disappearance.

programme.title: The Case: Deadly Insurance
programme.desc: A drawer affair where women multiply around a modern bluebeard.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Stephanie Isaacson sets off on her morning walk to school, but she never makes it. That same evening, her family's worst fears are confirmed when the 14-year-old girl's body is discovered.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The body of Tonya McKinley is unceremoniously found lying on the side of a city street. She has been sexually assaulted, and it is clear that the young mother had fought hard for her life.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: The naked body of Darlene Krashoc is discovered at 5:20 AM behind a restaurant. Hardened investigators are shocked by the brutality of this murder.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: For six decades, police work to identify the person who murdered a 9-year-old girl.

programme.title: Bloodline Detectives
programme.desc: Police spend decades trying to identify a baby whose body was discovered in 1982.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry and June find themselves the centre of attention after receiving a windfall.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When the landlord of the local pub is advised to have a rest by his doctor, Terry and June offer to run the place in his absence. However, their good deed looks set to backfire when Sir Dennis threatens to sack anyone found guilty of moonlighting.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry loves to be the centre of attention, but when he discovers he bears an uncanny resemblance to a criminal, he wishes the spotlight would focus on someone else.

programme.title: Don't Say It, Bring It
programme.desc: Jason visits Edinburgh, Belfast, Bristol and Newcastle-upon-Tyne.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: In this episode, the couple are moving to Purley but plan to redecorate the house before moving in - until they learn of the sinister reputation of their new home.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When it comes to moving house, Terry once again bites off more than he can chew.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry gets into a lather when a new carpet fails to arrive in time for a visit from his boss. The neighbours help him precipitate disaster.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry's company chairman needs a new bridge partner, so, with the future in mind, Terry and June give themselves a crash course in the game.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Exploring some of the most startling criminal cases of the past two decades where technology has changed the course of the investigations.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Joan Giambra was murdered, DNA technology and dogged police work linked the case to a string of other murders, helping to solve the crime and rectify a miscarriage of justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Mary Ann Perez left a bar just outside of New Orleans. Early the next morning, her family received a call from an anonymous woman, mentioning Mary had run into car trouble. She never returned home.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When Wendy Speakes was found dead wearing a stranger's shoes, police launched an investigation into who could have murdered a well-loved member of a quiet community.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hall of Fame Game

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Tough as Nails

programme.title: Auction Hunters: To Pawn or Not To Pawn

programme.desc: From mountain to sea, and from scorching desert to Arctic tundra, Europe’s great wilderness contains a stunning and surprising explosion of life. Wildest Europe reveals the incredible beauty and diversity of wildlife in Europe’s major natural habitats.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mitch becomes the Whiskers dominant male.

programme.title: Wild Baltic
programme.desc: The wide, often untouched wilderness of the Baltic hinterland is home to many animals. More than 35 brown bears live in the primeval forests of Alutaguse. In the spring, the Soomaa National Park transforms into a huge lake.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators: The Wolf Pack is Back
programme.desc: The wolf is performing a spectacular come back in the mountains of Italy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Three's Company
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Strip Search
programme.desc: When a stripper goes on the lam, Dog has to bring her in. It's a tough job but somebody has to do it. Thankfully for the team, Lady Luck is presiding over the posse tonight.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Secret Places
programme.desc: When Leland learns that one of his clients with a reputation for stealing has lost her co-signer and could be ready to run, Dog and the crew hop a plane to the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Wrong Turn
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Easy Rider
programme.desc: What looks like a routine pick-up turns into a complicated case of betrayal, deceit, as well as quality nail care as Dog and company track down a fugitive alleged to be an abusive boyfriend with one too many friends in his close knit community.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Call Waiting
programme.desc: Dog's target for today has been in trouble with the law since he was a juvenile. And he seems willing to use any trick in the system to avoid capture by Dog. In this match of wits, will Dog prevail?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Kid Stuff
programme.desc: A fugitive from justice is on the lam and it's Dog's job to find him. When they hit the last known address they discover he already has pulled up stakes and left no forwarding address. The posse's one hope is to locate his girlfriend.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Uneasy Rider
programme.desc: Willie puts Little Will on a budget for his first car but it backfires when Will decides to get a motorcycle instead. Jase and the guys are inspired to design a product using zip lines that will revolutionize duck hunting.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Good Willie Hunting
programme.desc: While many of the guys' wives and children are in Africa doing charity work, Willie and Jase get into a debate over tracking ability which leads to a challenge--can Jase and Si track and capture Willie and Jep?

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sleep Cover
programme.desc: With Korie still in Africa, Willie and Jep must step in and supervise Bella's sleepover. When a couple boys play a prank on the girls, Willie and Jep prove to be the perfect chaperones for the task.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drive-In Revivin'
programme.desc: Korie challenges Willie to come up with a romantic gesture without spending any money. Missy and Jase compete to see who can find a girlfriend for Mountain Man.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Fishful Thinking
programme.desc: Jase's hopes to win the inaugural Duck Commander Fishing Tournament is buoyed when he is able to enlist the help of legendary angler Bill Dance. Meanwhile, Willie's vanity over his greying beard leads him to make a questionable decision.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: When Doves Fry
programme.desc: Jase and Jep make a deal with Mia and Merritt to get them to go dove hunting with them. Si tries to make some extra cash by starting a West Monroe tour.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Carpnado
programme.desc: Jumping Asian carp have invaded Monroe's waters so Jase and the guys set out to try to stop them from spreading further. Meanwhile, Willie and Si have to run Willie's Duck Diner for the day.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Campfire Diaries
programme.desc: The family spends a weekend at their childhood summer camp, reliving old memories and working to repair a tennis court Willie built twenty years ago. While at the camp, Jep tries to pass a lifeguard swimming test he failed as a teenager.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Rowdy's Big Day
programme.desc: Rowdy's adoption is finalized and he officially becomes a Robertson. Jase gets his first massage and enjoys it more than he expected.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Disappearing Acts
programme.desc: After Willie and Jase lose Si's tea cup, Si makes them go to great lengths to find it. When the entertainment for Gus's 1st birthday party falls through, Jep fills in as a magician.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Dance Dads
programme.desc: Willie, Korie, Jase and Missy take dance lessons from Sadie to prepare for Reed and Rebecca's upcoming weddings. Jase's plan to perform Reed's wedding ceremony may fall through when he waits until the last minute to renew his ordainment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: The Source
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Goodbye, Mr. Zelinka

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Choices

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Summer Camp
programme.desc: After having been scarred in a fire, an actress becomes a counselor at a summer camp for blind children. The camp is run by Jonathan and Mark's blind friend Frank.

programme.desc: This episode explores what would happen if a zombie outbreak ever became a reality.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Signs of Abduction: From loss of time and bizarre hazy memories, to terrifying accounts of alien surgery, these are the hidden signs of alien abduction.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Nazi UFOs: Could alien technology have helped the Nazis' rise to power? Experts question whether Hitler had extraterrestrial help in his quest for world domination.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Between 1981 and 2011, cameras on NASA space shuttles have picked up many images of UFOs that experts still struggle to explain.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Discover theories relating to why aliens are interested in visiting Earth, including the allures of the human mind and human civilisation.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the US government's classified and declassified investigations into UFO sightings.

programme.title: Dynasty: Images
programme.desc: Krystle discovers damaging information regarding Alexis' marriage to Cecil Colby, Leslie follows Sean to his father's grave, learning his true identity as Joseph Aynders' son; Dana returns to Adam and the two quietly forget the past.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Rifle
programme.desc: Forced by Adam and Fallon's vote, Steven reluctantly agrees to authorize the Vitron oil deal, as Sean's maniacal scheme to avenge his father's death begins to unfold; Krystle obtains a copy of Cecil Colby's original will.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Bracelet
programme.desc: Encouraged by her popular support after the shooting, Alexis decides to stay in the race; Sean speeds his plan to use the Vitron oil deal to crush Alexis; Karen is unnerved by the return of her ex-husband.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Warning
programme.desc: Tired of Leslie's threats to expose his true identity, Sean plants a poisonous snake in her room as a warning of who she is dealing with; having second thoughts about accepting Adam's bribe to stay away from Karen, Jesse gives the money back.

programme.title: Dynasty: Adam's Son
programme.desc: Karen is rushed to the hospital to the hospital as she goes into labor; after Sean threatens Leslie, she confides in Dex, Sean's true identity; Dex warns Alexis that Sean may be seeking vengeance against her as she listens in horror.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: After being paralysed as a teenager, Robert met Ashleigh online and they fell in love. With news he may not have much longer to live, Robert asks Nev and Max to bring Ashleigh to him. (S6, ep16)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Robin is desperate to meet her hunky, long-distance love in person. Nev and Max agree to help her hunt him down, but what they uncover turns out to be much more than Robin bargained for! (S6, ep17)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: For years, Nicole has had her pictures stolen to make fake profiles, one of which has been catfishing Ryan for ten years. Ryan and Nicole are unsure whether it's a random troll, or they have a common enemy.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Jasmine writes to Nev and Max asking for help for a "friend". But they're perplexed when Jasmine drops a bombshell revelation: they've helped her friend before! (S6, ep19)
