programme.desc: A celebrated actress runs down a hobo by accident and a witness blackmails her, threatening to expose her secret.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Rocket
programme.desc: A top-secret rocket is compromised when one of the scientists runs into gambling debts. Peter heads out on a desperate search for the missing rocket.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Blind Justice
programme.desc: When an airline pilot is framed for drug smuggling, a killer comes to his home to silence him... and the pilot's blind wife (Honor Blackman) is the only witness.

programme.title: The Amazing Transparent Man
programme.desc: A crazed scientist invents an invisibility formula. He plans to use the formula to create an army of invisible zombies.

programme.title: Lost Creek

programme.title: Fierce People
programme.desc: A drug addict (Diane Lane) and her teenage son (Anton Yelchin) spend a fateful summer at a benevolent billionaire's (Donald Sutherland) lavish estate.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A pro baseball team visits Evergreen Forest and seeks a new player. Bert and Cedric both compete for the spot, straining their friendship as rivalry grows. In the end, they must decide what matters more, success or their bond.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril offers Bert a deal to become the face of his new cologne line. Tempted by fame and money, Bert considers the offer, but soon realizes the cost of endorsing Cyril’s schemes and must choose between integrity and success.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril panics when his betrayed partner Karl Snarl returns for revenge. Meanwhile, Bert discovers an old helicopter, and Melissa must overcome her fear of heights to help save her friends during a dangerous confrontation.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Melissa explore echo caverns and discover strange cave art. Cyril, seeing profit potential, enters the art world and drives up prices. The gang must decide whether art is about value or meaning as greed takes over.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Cedric meet a hermit living in a swamp rumored to hold oil. Cyril attempts to buy the land, threatening the hermit’s home. The gang must protect the swamp and prove its worth beyond the profit Cyril seeks.

programme.title: The Raccoons

programme.desc: Danny is undertaking a drugs trial at Leopard's Den. But de-worming wildebeest isn't Caroline's idea of fun. She hates animals and finds the whole business mind-numbingly boring.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When an accident puts Dr. Stein's (Mark Hamill) colleague, Rachel, in a coma, he uses his newly-created invention to reach her brain and tell her he loves her. However, Stein discovers that love takes strange turns when it enters the virtual world.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.desc: While protecting an exposed heiress, Cat and Vincent hunt a black market buyer targeting beasts. They realise how much is at stake if Vincent’s identity is revealed. Nina Lisandrello, Austin Basis, and Nicole Gale Anderson also star.

programme.title: Deadly Women

programme.title: On the Case: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: A beautiful young mother is found murdered while walking her dogs. Investigators suspect her killer is someone she knew. Twenty-six years latter police make an arrest but is he the right man?

programme.title: On the Case: Path of Tears
programme.desc: A 14-year-old girl is killed while walking her dog on a popular community bike trail.

programme.title: On the Case: "Precious" Jane Doe
programme.desc: After a young woman is viciously murdered, police launch a two-part investigation; one to find her killer and a second to identify his victim, "Precious" Jane Doe.

programme.title: On the Case: No Body Two Crimes
programme.desc: A Wilmington, North Carolina, woman is reported missing after she fails to show up for her own birthday celebration. Police never imagined that their investigation would ultimately reveal a gruesome second crime.

programme.title: On the Case: A Face with No Name
programme.desc: Police have DNA evidence and a videotape of their suspect, yet they still struggle to find a vicious killer.

programme.title: On the Case: Footsteps in the Dark
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman's is murdered in a dark parking lot. Did she know her killer or was she the victim of a deadly predator?

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Murder By Mail: Keith Cottingham
programme.desc: In 1984 a parcel bomb was sent to a 53-year-old grandmother living in a tranquil English village. She died of horrific injuries. No one understood why it had happened. The only evidence detectives had was the bomb itself.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: DNA Of A Murder: Andrew George
programme.desc: Hilda Murrell, a 78-year-old distinguished rose-grower, was found dead in woodland near her home town. Despite a huge investigation by the British police, detectives failed to find her killer and conspiracy theories muddied the waters still further.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Appointment With Death: Scott Singleton
programme.desc: Robbie Coltrane examines the case of Scott Singleton, who murdered a 17-year-old girl after luring her to a bogus job interview.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Dead Man's Hollow: Nishan Bakunts
programme.desc: In 2002, an off-duty fireman discovered a body in a field charred beyond all recognition. All the police knew was that the man had died a brutal death, having been stabbed repeatedly, shot in the head, and drenched in petrol before being set alight.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: The Saturday Night Strangler: Joe Kappen
programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Citizen Jane
programme.desc: When Gertrude McCabe was murdered, her niece Jane Alexander was named her principal beneficiary. Jane, a widow in her 70s, began to suspect that her live-in boyfriend, Tom O'Donnell, might have been involved in the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Daddy's Little Girl
programme.desc: At 16 Mindy Berenyi, an Antwerp, Ohio girl claiming to be a victim of physical and psychological abuse, was tried for the murder of her father and, having agreed to a plea bargain, was sentenced to prison.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Accused
programme.desc: In 1996 the car which Sheila Bryan was driving with her mother as passenger accidentally veered off the road and into a ditch killing her mother. Sheila was charged with murder -- then tried, convicted, and sentenced to life imprisonment.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ghosts of Mississippi
programme.desc: A report on a string of unsolved homicides in Columbus, Mississippi. Five elderly residents, all living within a mile of each other, were killed within 18 months. Police say, a terrified community believes a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Elizabeth Welsh's husband, Patrick, left her and their two sons what appeared to be a suicide note and disappeared. After investigating the situation, Elizabeth discovered that Patrick is still alive, living in Texas.

programme.desc: On the rural floodplain of northwestern Kentucky, spring rains wash human bones from a culvert near where a missing man, Rodney "Bo" Hale, was last seen three years ago.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: The condition of a mummified body that is found in the arid farmlands of Solano County, Calif., in 1996 leaves it unidentified for over 10 years, but when a cold case is reexamined, a startling connection is made.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion

programme.desc: In 2014 a sex offender called Robert Hind goes missing from a bail hostel. Cops fear he’s absconded to commit crime. The town is scoured. But then the cops learn that the sex offender hasn’t absconded - he’s been murdered.

programme.title: Murdertown: Sunderland
programme.desc: Throughout the early '90s young boys would be found dead after sniffing glue and being trapped in derelict buildings which caught fire. Cops soon found they were actually being systematically murdered by a man called Steven Grieveson.

programme.title: Murdertown: Brighton
programme.desc: In 2015 a man visits a tarot card reader. Within an hour she’s dealt out the death card and he’s confessed to a murder. When cops arrive they discover he’s been living at home with his victim’s body for days.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Hannegret Donnelly

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Iain Lawrence
programme.desc: Ian and Sally Lawrence were a glamorous couple, and they looked like they had it all. But their marriage suffered when Ian’s star started to fall as Sally’s career rocketed. And when the couple suffered a terrible car crash, only one came out alive.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Chaz Higgs
programme.desc: High-profile politician Kathy Augustine married nurse Chaz Higgs after a whirlwind romance. They were an unlikely match, and when their marriage hit the rocks, Chaz decided to use his medical training to commit an undetectable crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Denise Williams
programme.desc: Denise Williams was devastated when her husband Mike disappeared on a hunting trip. He was feared drowned. But Mike’s mother Cheryl didn’t buy it, and after years of relentless campaigning, she finally uncovered the truth about her son’s death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Paul Novak
programme.desc: Paul Novak was a thrill-seeking paramedic who loved the hustle and bustle of the city. His wife Catherine was a homemaker and volunteer who preferred small town life. Unable to reconcile their differences, Paul decided to plan the perfect crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Janbaz Tarin

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Scared Straight

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All My Children

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Baby

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck No, We Won't Go

programme.desc: When NASCAR sensation Clint Bowyer pays a visit to the Duck Commander warehouse, Willie and the guys are fired up to spend the day hanging out with the professional racecar driver.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Duck Season Eve
programme.desc: Tomorrow is the opening day of Duck Season and the men are carrying on their tradition of camping on the Robertson Land the night before.

programme.desc: The guys learn from Willie that John Luke is going through his first break up. In order to make him feel better the men decide to take John Luke hunting for nutria, and impart their relationship wisdom.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 1

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 2

programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Return of the Masked Rider

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Song of the Wild West
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a young country singer who is hoping to follow in her mother's footsteps. Next, they help a widow mourning her late husband.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens and the Vatican

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 13

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 12
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 6

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed

programme.title: Dynasty: Broken Krystle
programme.desc: Following Sean's death, Alexis is comforted by Dex's solace and friendship, as the two renew their passionate love for each; Jeff and Sammy Jo are horrified to find her diary and a dead body in the water.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Touch of Sable

programme.title: Dynasty: She's Back

programme.title: Dynasty: Alexis in Blunderland

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jarrod & Abby

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Kya & Alyx
programme.desc: In this episode we meet Kya and Alyx, who fell in love quickly after meeting online. Are they being honest with each other? Hosts Nev Schulman and Max Joseph investigate.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joe & Kari Ann

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tyler & Amanda

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Stephanie & David

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In 1924, a girl found a quartz crystal skull in Central America, believing it had telepathic powers. Legend says thirteen such skulls will unlock life’s mysteries. Modern science has debunked their authenticity, despite some being in museums.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: Famed archaeologist Ralegh Radford stares into an empty pit; has he found the final resting place of King Arthur, the wielder of Excalibur, the founder of Camelot and the Lord of the Round Table?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: In WWII's final days, Nazis hid evidence of their crimes. SS officers transported boxes to Austria's remote Lake Toplitz, witnessed dumping them on May 1, 1945. Rumors. Rumors claimed the boxes held stolen gold, part of a $500M Nazi heist.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A young archaeologist risks everything in his quest to find one of the world’s greatest treasures – the fabled lost library of Ivan the Terrible.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside The ROM, Toronto
programme.desc: From a medieval hand-grenade to an extremely rare dinosaur, discover the secrets inside the Royal Ontario Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Archeological Museum of Athens
programme.desc: From a dodgy archeologist who discovers a golden mask to an ancient gadget that reveals the future, discover the secrets inside the National Archaeological Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Hermitage Museum
programme.desc: From ancient mummies who sport tattoos to re-examining who really killed Rasputin, discover the secrets inside the State Hermitage Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Naked Science: Diamonds
programme.desc: Naked Science follows the story of a diamond from the creation of carbon inside the heart of a dying sun, through to the cutting of a diamond mine in South Africa.

programme.title: Wonders: Can We Build a Brain?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders looks at how far we’ve come with artificially intelligent machines and where they are headed as their software becomes ever more…cerebral.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Flight Status
programme.desc: The latest updates on the new space hardware about to launch us into the next generation of space flight some rockets and capsules are on time others not so fortunate.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The Ionisphere, where the Earth interfaces with space, is little understood, it effects radio communications, GPS signals and satellites alike.

programme.title: Neil Armstrong: One Small Step
programme.desc: Neil Armstrong has stamped his place in history by becoming the first person to walk on the moon.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Cosmic and x rays, these mysterious and highly powerful particles from deep space are being investigated to finally discover where they come from.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympis
programme.desc: These are the the Moon's of the gas giants. Each a unique and mysterious world of its own. Some have oceans of water, geysers of Sulphur or atmospheres of plastic.

programme.title: The New Frontier: PEERING INTO THE ABYSS

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration

programme.title: Arthur: The Perfect Game/D.W.'s Furry Freakout

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Time Trouble/Buster's Amish Mismatch
programme.desc: D.W. is tired of being bossed around all the time and demands to know why she couldn't have been born before Arthur! And during a trip to Amish country, Buster becomes enamored with the simple life and vows to forgo modern conveniences.

programme.title: Arthur: Feeling Flush/Family Fortune
programme.desc: During a drought, Francine bets Arthur that her family can use less water than his. The TV show, Treasure Caravan, is coming to Elwood City! Arthur and D.W. are convinced they'll find treasures that will make them rich and famous.

programme.title: Arthur: Prunella's Special Edition/The Secret Life Of Dogs & Babies

programme.title: Arthur: The Lousy Week/You Are Arthur

programme.title: Arthur: The Curse of the Grebes/Arthur Changes Gears

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Secret Admirer/The Last King of Lambland

programme.title: Arthur: War of the Worms/I Owe You One

programme.title: Arthur: Double Tibble Trouble/Arthur's Almost Live Not Real Music Festival
programme.desc: Playing with the Tibble twins requires preparation, endurance and earplugs. But when one gets sick, playing with the other should be a lot easier, right? Arthur and the gang create their own music videos.

programme.title: War Story

programme.title: I Have Never Forgotten You

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Shamed by the drama that broke out at their brokers' open, James and David try to salvage their relationship with the sellers; Tracy tries to find a home for her friend; Flagg creates a hilarious short film to help market an ultra-modern listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: In an attempt to sell her Del Mar listing, Tracy heads to the racetrack in search of wealthy buyers; Josh Altman faces wife Heather when trying to sell a problematic listing; Josh Flagg bakes up a plan to get back on James and David's good side.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Josh Altman goes full hipster in his last ditch effort to sell an architectural wonder in a trendy Venice neighborhood; Tracy takes over a stale listing in Brentwood and attempts to revive the grandeur of the historic Georgian estate.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: Michael tasks James and brother David with finding him a development opportunity, leading to a visit to the house where the movie, "Mommie Dearest," was filmed; Josh Flagg battles his control issues while teaming up with Bobby.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: In an attempt to sell a villa that has sat on the market for a year, Josh Altman rents a dunk tank to entice buyers; James and David enter heated negotiations involving the Playboy Bunny Ranch and the "Mommie Dearest" house.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: James works hard to sell a home to singer Kelly Rowland; Josh Flagg gets creative to sell a Bel Air pad built for guitarist Robby Krieger; Tracy lands a shot at representing a billion-dollar development in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: 115 people on board a VIA passenger train on February 8, 1986, a pleasant trip would turn into a horrifying nightmare.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: A hi-jacked Ethiopian Airlines 767 runs out of fuel near the Comoros Islands. From 31,000 feet the plane plunges toward the sea.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster
programme.desc: August 2, 2005 - Flight 358 bursts into flames when it skids off the runway in Toronto during a raging thunderstorm. More than 300 passengers and crew have only seconds to escape the burning plane.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Gite owners in France face plumbing problems for their first guests. A Buckinghamshire couple’s bid to buy their dream home hits problems. And two Bristol caterers face a colossal cooking challenge.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A catering couple from Bristol face a plumbing crisis. In France, a major swimming pool leak hits two expats’ holiday apartment business. And a Buckinghamshire couple’s bid to impress a VIP guest at their holiday cycling business suffers a setback.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A major leak threatens to drain much-needed finances from two expats’ holiday apartment business. In Spain, a Buckinghamshire couple’s cycling holiday venture hits the skids. And in France, a Yorkshire can-can dancer teaches her amateur troupe.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Buckinghamshire couple face a battle to boost bookings for their cycling business. In France, a Yorkshire dancer prepares her amateur troupe for their first public performance. And a couple tackle rising costs as they race to open their bed & breakfast.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: Foodies from Warwick have grand plans to start cooking holidays in rural France, three generations of a family from Kent open a French campsite, and a couple from Brighton run holiday lets in rural Spain.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A couple with a gite in France find their pool is infested with algae, a family running a French campsite have no hot water, and a couple with holiday lets in Spain are in money trouble.

programme.title: Avalanche: Man Versus Earth
programme.desc: Tumbling snow can be a massively destructive force. With new science, can we gain the advantage to control it?

programme.title: China Quake
programme.desc: In 2008, China’s monster quake claimed 80,000 lives and destroyed five million buildings.

programme.title: Airline Disaster: Crash of the Century
programme.desc: This film reconstructs the moments leading up to the tragedy of an airline disaster.

programme.title: SuperTornado: Anatomy of a Megadisaster
programme.desc: A look at Joplin, Missouri five years after one of the worst natural disasters in U.S. history razed the town.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: A sleepy Canadian town is devastated when a 74-car freight train derails downtown, killing dozens.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: Meta-Squadron has managed to capture Fly-Girl and Crusher, forcing Raven to offer a trade - the release of his agents for the return of a missing Metajets officer

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: The sharks accidentally get sent to the future where Piranoid has spread an air-born gene-slamming virus which has turned most of the world into subservient Seaviates. Only Bends' great great great grandson and a few other rebels didn't catch the virus.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: When Johnny saves a fellow pilot from a fiery crash during a practise run, it leads to a reluctant friendship with the son of Carmone Fontaine, head of the Soaring Heights organized crime syndicate.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mars
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Ruin
programme.desc: From an ancient submerged city a beautiful girl issues a warning about the devastating power - and danger - of three special, combining minicons. The Autobots already have two of them: now Megatron aims to capture the third.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Head Two Head / The Last of the Wild
programme.desc: Suzi and Gretchen get fused into a two-headed Gruzi!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Base
programme.desc: Alexis, Rad and Carlos introduce themselves to Optimus Prime, Hot Rod and First Aid, and get a condensed history of the conflict. Meanwhile, on the moon, Megatron plots to capture the minicons that are now appearing all over earth.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Linkup
programme.desc: With Optimus damaged and temporarily out of commission, the newly-arrived Jetfire takes command - and seriously underestimates the Decepticons. But on the verge of defeat, Optimus reveals a new ability.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Lost Incident
programme.desc: The chilling details of the past are finally revealed as Playmaker continues his battle with Zaizen.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Jet wakes up on the floor of the museum one day to find it over-run by Skor and his Links. On top of that, Kane, Chow, and Lucy seemed to have joined forces with Skor, as they obey his every command. What happened?

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In Naroom's forest, the kids are heading toward a giant obelisk, a structure which the Book of Elders says contains the Naroomi Dreamstone. On route, our trio are packing up camp when Tony starts having seeing things from his Earth life.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Showtime!
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Splish! Splash!
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. Everyone is anxiously awaiting Mrs. Matuma’s Harambee Dance Troupe to arrive.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Your Birthday, Barney
programme.desc: Every day with Barney is fun—but today is extra special. It's Barney's birthday!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Layla and her friends celebrate her birthday in the park with foods that aren’t traditionally American.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On Again, Off Again
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about "on" and "off" by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ, Baby Bop and Riff can hardly wait for the petting zoo that is coming to the park. Riff feels terrible when he accidentally wrecks BJ’s beloved scooter.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Curse of the Evil Eye
programme.desc: Shredder is in control of the Eye of Sarnoth, enabling him to transmute matter. Shredder brings to life a dragon which soars through the air with shocked shellbacks Leonardo and Michelangelo aboard.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Case of the Killer Pizzas
programme.desc: The Turtles' favourite food, pizza, is also the source of their problem. Nasty, fanged creatures have been planted in pizza boxes! When the critters crack open their chrysalises, they become enormous.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Fly
programme.desc: Shredder sends April a rare duko plant that renders her unconscious. The Turtles seek a rare leaf that can serve as an antidote.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Punk Frogs
programme.desc: Mutagen, sent by Krang from Dimension X, changes four Florida frogs into half-human creatures four and a half feet tall. Shredder, training them in his evil ways, names them Attila the Frog, Genghis Frog, Rasputin the Mad Frog and Napoleon Bonafrog.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter No More
programme.desc: Michelangelo senses that their mentor is "mondo depressed" and Donatello finds a way of changing back Splinter the rat to Yoshi the man.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): New York's Shiniest
programme.desc: Shredder taps into New York's computers to steal plans for robots and creates an army of robots to destroy the Turtles and loot the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Neutrino teens Kala, Zak and Eask arrive on Earth and alert the Turtles to Shredder's latest plan to make "mindless zombies" of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Catwoman from Channel 6
programme.desc: A matter transporter results in strange happenings including TV reporter April O'Neil being put into a cat-like state and a tiger chasing the Turtles and Splinter, their mentor-rat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Technodrome
programme.desc: To bring the Technodrome back to Earth, Shredder is instructed to take over the Niagara Falls hydroelectric station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beneath These Streets
programme.desc: While the Turtles, in disguise, are at a movie, Shredder interrupts a press conference to steal a new medi-laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on Trial
programme.desc: While the Turtles go on a talk show to prove their innocence to the world, Krang steals a robot and some Solarbenite from a military warehouse, with the intention of destroying the Turtles himself.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Inspired by the romantic comedy film they watched at the cinema, Best and Bester decide to play Cupid. Dust moves in with the twins.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester have to do their best to board their flight even though they don't look like the pictures on their passports. Best decides to make his sister win Employee of the Month.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: When Rocky swallows the last piece of their jigsaw puzzle, Best and Bester head into the unknown to retrieve it. Plus, Best and Bester go on a mission to return an overdue library book without being spotted by the scary librarian.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester gate-crash the set of their favourite soap opera to find out what happens next. Bester sets out to prove to a cynical Best that the new Beast of Bettervale movie is based on a true story.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Bester finds herself running for President of the Book Club against her good friend Rocky. Best and Bester accidentally list the Sub as a guest house, and they receive a visitor who they must impress.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Best and Bester get too carried away when tasked with commercialising Bettervale's most beguiling natural wonder. Diamondo is used to getting everything he wants, and decides what he wants is a sibling, just like Best and Bester.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: When Best breaks the last clean plate, rather than do the dishes, Best and Bester head out to buy a brand new one. Plus, Best and Bester decide to make the best milkshake ever, only to find themselves in a bitter contest with Flip Flop.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: Best wins a competition to pitch his story ideas to world-famous author A N Other, and finds that three's a crowd. Best and Bester house-sit for Diamondo and realise that there's more to it than massage chairs and unlimited snacks.

programme.title: Best & Bester
programme.desc: After a period of exile, Best and Bester return hoping to patch things up with their neighbours and with each other.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The theme for the seven remaining cast mates is spy films. Firstly they have to evade lasers to escape from a building, and Jason is injured. Then they must defuse stink bombs.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Ash prepares for his final rematch with Brandon at the Battle Pyramid by rounding up the Pokémon he’s been with the longest, spending his time sharing old memories with them and training intensely.

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Ash has lost to Brandon in two previous battles, and now his Charizard has been defeated! Can he battle back to claim the final Frontier Symbol?

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: Ash has beaten the Battle Frontier, but his competitive spirit won’t let him rest for long, and he and May both sign up for an unofficial Pokémon Contest in Terracotta Town!

programme.title: Pokemon: Advanced Battle
programme.desc: After one last contest battle between Ash and May, our heroes go their separate ways, and Ash discovers his next adventure!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash Ketchum, a 10-year-old from Pallet Town, is finally old enough to receive his first Pokémon! However, he oversleeps, and the only remaining Pokémon at Professor Oak’s lab is a strong-willed Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash rushes into Viridian City with his wounded Pikachu, where he encounters Jessie, James, and Meowth of Team Rocket, as well as Misty, who’s angry about Ash wrecking her bike!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash discovers and catches his first Pokémon! Though he’s excited, Misty is grossed out by his new Bug-type Pokémon friend.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: An angry swarm of Beedrill attacks Ash and Samurai in the midst of a Metapod standoff! Ash flees, leaving behind his Metapod, who is mad at him for abandoning it.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash challenges the Pewter City Gym Leader, Brock, but even Pikachu has no chance against Brock’s Rock-type Pokémon. With the mysterious Flint helping him, it’s time for Ash to train hard before the rematch!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: A scientist leads Ash and his friends deep into Mt. Moon to find the storied Moon Stone, which is said to increase the power of Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash seeks the Cascade Badge in Cerulean City—but for some reason, Misty doesn’t want to join him.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies find each other for a big hug before watching a little girl read her sister a story that she has written and illustrated herself. It’s called ‘The Girl In The Back Garden’.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch a little boy show us how to make a Turban. The Tubbies go for a walk, but Po, Laa-Laa and Dipsy want to play with their favourite things, so Tinky Winky goes for a walk on his own – all the way home.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995

programme.desc: In 1973, three young girls were beaten, raped and strangled over a six-week period. The Saturday Night Strangler escaped justice for almost 30 years. But new techniques in DNA technology and a midnight exhumation finally uncovered the killer.

programme.title: Killer Town

programme.title: Killer Town
programme.desc: A Halloween murder shocks the entire community of Armstrong, B.C. With little more than a composite sketch to go on, investigators work tirelessly to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Killer Town

programme.desc: A report on families who have experienced the violent death of a loved one and believe they know the identity of the killer but lack evidence to back the charge.

programme.desc: The team investigate a venue with a fascinating history and colourful past. With unexplained noises being reported regularly, as well as ghostly forms, the team makes a disturbing discovery in their pitch-black surroundings: they are not alone.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
programme.desc: Russell wants to put his family back together after his three children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year-old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiancé Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: What Happened to My Baby?
programme.desc: Baby Garrett died of an oxycodone drug overdose while in Sharon’s care. His mother Casey left him with Sharon so she could visit her husband Kenneth in the hospital. Who’s responsible?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Lagraciala tragically lost her ten month old son and cremated him, but after a serious fight with her fiancée AJ, she couldn't find the ashes. AJ admits to threatening to steal the ashes, but denies he took them!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: My Teen Daughter Wants a Baby
programme.desc: 17-year-old Naomi has undergone a sudden attitude change and is on a mission to have a baby. Parents Leeanders and April need Steve to intervene!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Shocking Betrayal
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Faces Death
programme.desc: During WWII, several murders occur at a convalescent home where Dr. Watson has volunteered his services. Holmes is summoned to solve the crime from a long list of suspects including the owners, staff, and the patients.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Eiffel Tower
programme.desc: After a famous criminal is run over and killed by a milk wagon, Insp. Lestrade finds a mysterious coded note in the man's clothing.

programme.title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr Watson investigate the legend of a supernatural hound, a beast that may be stalking a young heir on the fog-shrouded moorland that makes up his estate.

programme.title: Sherlock: A Case of Evil
programme.desc: This tale focuses on the young 20-something Sherlock Holmes. Sherlock is in pursuit of the evil Moriarty and apparently shoots him to death, but his body cannot be found as he falls in a sewer.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The wannabe chefs must combine their skills and work as individuals for the first time. The prize is a trip with Chef Ramsay to get a taste of the restaurant at the Red Rock Casino Resort.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining contestants must create a meal fit for service in 15 minutes out of a tray of leftovers from the previous night.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The final three contestants must serve an entire dining room.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay divides Hell's Kitchen between the two remaining contestants, who design a decor and a menu, then come up with names for their halves.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Twelve aspirants try to impress Gordon Ramsay, as they compete for the post of head chef at a Las Vegas restaurant.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: After a disastrous opening night, both teams prepare for the next challenge; a contestant starts to succumb to the pressure; a challenge tests food-preparation skills; another chef must leave.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Psychics Revealed - Special
programme.desc: Behind the scenes with the psychics on the show.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Described as a brutal execution, 46-year-old grandmother Chattrice Maihi-Carroll was found naked, stabbed to death in her New Zealand home in 2008. There were multiple suspects and everything seemed resolved following the arrest of a neighbour.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: All Aboard the Ghost Train
programme.desc: This historic roundhouse and rail yard is connected to more that just old trains. The frightening remnants of a serial killer, horrific accidents and one of the worst train crashes have two people questioning strange encounters.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost Guards
programme.desc: An armory that's been standing for over 100 years harbors a ghostly mystery. Recent female leadership is coinciding with increased paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Phantom For the First Course
programme.desc: A renowned restaurant, The Whitney, once owned by a lumber baron in the 1800's, might still have family members hanging around its halls. Renovations and construction around the property could be behind the uprising of spirits.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Children in the Attic
programme.desc: One of the oldest yacht clubs in the USA is also one of the most haunted! A mother and her son are entangled in phenomena involving a frightening family from the past with a strange story to tell.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Pirates
programme.desc: Fear is spreading at Fort Taber-Fort Rodmanthat a new \\"living history event\\" has stirred up frightening paranormal activity on the park grounds.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Willie or Won’t He
programme.desc: Yvonne is concerned that William is never going to marry her because they have not set a date for the wedding. When Yvonne asks Joan for advice, Joan tries her best to stay out of it but ends up telling Yvonne to move in with William first to try it out.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Breaking Up Is Hard To Do
programme.desc: While newlyweds Kim and Jerel make plans to move to Paris, Professor Oglevee schemes to make Veronica jealous.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Reunited

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Oddest Couple
programme.desc: Professor Oglevee and Kim have roommate problems.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: J.c. Bowl
programme.desc: A scholastic competition sparks a new love in Kim’s life and an old rivalry from Professor Oglevee’s past.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Whassup With Heyyy?
programme.desc: After T launches a successful business using one of Kim and Nikki’s favorite sayings, all three of them wind up in court.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Scary Kim

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Election 2000
programme.desc: Nikki and Kim square off in a campus election.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Heir Today, Gone Tomorrow

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: TURKEY DAY BLUES
programme.desc: After a minor spat with Nikki gets blown way out of proportion, Kim spendsThanksgiving alone.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Cheers
programme.desc: Nikki tries out for cheerleading and Professor Oglevee tries too hard to be hip.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Desperate Households
programme.desc: When Julie and her family moved into their dream home in suburban New Jersey they quickly realized they were not alone.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Vendetta
programme.desc: P.R.S. investigates claims of supernatural revenge in the Pennsylvania Poconos. When a client's new boyfriend moves in, does the paranormal move in with him? Or did her ex put a hex on her house and the entire family?

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: Yvette takes the Most Haunted team to Wales to conduct a full investigation in the daylight, as most of the haunting occur before the darkness of night. An investigation that proved unrestful spirits do not just inhabit the night.

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Most Haunted
programme.desc: The team enter a museum full of vehicular artefacts, a haunted building with haunted attractions and the many spirits said to roam a quick to make their presence known.

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Most Haunted

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Amateur
programme.desc: Before the IMF can get the prototype of an Iron Curtain country's secret weapon to the United States, part of the weapon falls into the hands of an unscrupulous, greedy nightclub owner, in "The Amateur"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Catafalque
programme.desc: With the threat of another off-shore missile crisis and perhaps a confrontation that could lead to war, the IMF is called upon to expose a nuclear arms treaty secretly signed by a previously friendly country and a hostile power in "The Catafalque"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Squeeze Play
programme.desc: A leading illegal supplier of heroin is dying of cancer and is about to designate a successor and turn over to him the only known list containing all the vital information about the entire drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Merchant

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Cat's Paw
programme.desc: Hari Rhodes guest stars as George Corley, an underworld leader whose link with a police precinct chief is the object of Barney's brother's newspaper crusade in "Cat's Paw"

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Flying Ton, Creeping Allen
programme.desc: When a group of thugs try to bully Ton and Allen out of a Chinatown auction, the guys fight back, leading to a violent showdown and the discovery of both a rare Bornean blowgun and special effects wire harnesses.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Missouri Loves Company
programme.desc: On a visit to see Ton's sister in Missouri for some rafting and relaxation, the guys hit up a fast-paced live auction. After some tough losses, Ton and Allen score a ballista and an anvil set made for an explosive sport.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Brew-Phoria
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go all in for an electric car, but with the batteries missing, a pricey refurb is their only shot at a profit. Will a home brewing system and high-end air rifles help soften the blow, or will they take a big loss?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Got Served
programme.desc: After a crushing defeat, the guys leave an auction empty handed and scramble to find new merchandise at a yard sale. But questionable antique tennis rackets and an ancient special effects box may not earn them a cent.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Whittier gets ugly when a buyer named Big Dave tries to take it all. After some tough losses, the guys win a state of the art food truck and an off-road rock crawler with dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Attic
programme.desc: A series of photographs show what you cannot see with the naked eye: an evil face in the attic.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Forgotten

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Police suspect that a mother of two has relapsed into drugs when she disappears, but her family and friend suspect foul play.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Detectives investigating the disappearance of a woman agree a plea deal with the main suspect, her ex-husband. When he leads them to her body, they are faced with a horrific scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a loving wife and mother is found shot to death in her own bed, the case goes cold for two years until determined detectives set their sights on justice and reveal a murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: When US marine veteran Darrell Blagg is found shot dead outside his New Mexico home, a lucky break leads detectives to suspect his wife has links to the murderer.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Exploring the various methods used by police to extract confessions. Detectives in Waterloo, Iowa attempt to uncover the truth from a man suspected of shooting two people dead in a car.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of a kind-hearted single mother points to three suspects, all claiming innocence.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A young archaeologist risks everything in his quest to find one of the world’s greatest treasures – the fabled lost library of Ivan the Terrible.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Shroud of Turin
programme.desc: Is this famous piece of linen cloth the actual burial cloth of Jesus Christ or a clever Medieval hoax?

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A local newspaper editor and businessman in South Africa unwittingly finds himself at the epicentre of a legend of buried gold that began during the Boer War.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Energy Healing
programme.desc: Several energy healers claim they are able to produce spontaneous miraculous healing through a laying on of hands. Claims of similar such healing by a man in a remote village in Brazil, known as John of God are also examined.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the supposed mastermind behind the 9/11 terrorist attacks and leader of the Al Qaeda terrorist cell remained a CIA asset until his death.

programme.title: Myth Hunters
programme.desc: A fortune in gold is buried in the Rocky Mountains, with only a cryptic map as a clue. For nearly 200 years, descendants of a French expedition have sought it. But the Curse of Treasure Mountain has thwarted all attempts to find the hidden bullion.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums, Berlin
programme.desc: From Vikings who break unbreakable swords to curators who solve the world’s hardest jigsaw puzzle, discover the secrets inside the Pergamon and Neues Museums.

programme.title: Wonders: Can We Build a Brain?
programme.desc: NOVA Wonders looks at how far we’ve come with artificially intelligent machines and where they are headed as their software becomes ever more…cerebral.

programme.title: Naked Science: Mars
programme.desc: Mars our closest neighbor now a lifeless planet – but it may once have had water and therefore life. Naked Science investigates the red planet to learn how it was formed, how it became barren, and ask whether it ever will be possible to colonize it?

programme.title: scienceNOW: Can We Live Forever?
programme.desc: NOVA scienceNOW tackles the big question: can we live forever? Hosted by astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson, examine these topics: Can My Car Live Forever?; Body Shop - Body Parts; Can We Slow Aging?; and Hibernation.

programme.title: Naked Science: Jupiter
programme.desc: By far the largest planet, 1300 times the size of Earth, it’s a world so enormous it could swallow every planet and moon in the solar system and still have room to spare.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: scienceNOW: What Makes Us Human?
programme.desc: Explore traits we once thought were uniquely ours- language, tool-making, even laughter- to uncover their evolutionary roots.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Invasion on Mars
programme.desc: The EXO Mars and Curiosity continue their scientific discoveries as we prepare new missions both robotic and manned to the Red planet Mars.

programme.title: How to Colonize the Stars

programme.title: The New Frontier: Atmosphere
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space?

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: The Truth is in the Stars EU
programme.desc: Does our society have the capacity to live up to Star Trek's optimistic vision for humanity's future? William Shatner takes us on a journey to find out whether art has imitated life in the years since the world-renowned TV series premiered in 1966.

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Pilfered Paper/Buster Gets Real

programme.title: Arthur: Listen Up!/Arthur's New Old Vacation

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and The Real Mr. Ratburn/Arthur's Spelling Trubble

programme.title: Arthur: Night of the Tibble/Read and Flumberghast

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 1
programme.desc: This first episode covers the last week of February to late March. When American troops started their final invasion of Nazi Germany in February 1945, U.S. Army cameramen were at their side.

programme.title: Embedded 45' - Shooting War in Germany: Embedded 45 - Shooting War in Germany 2
programme.desc: This second episode covers the last week of March to late April. The cameramen covered many stories of victory and defeat, death and liberation. Faces of despair and joy, scenes of war and peace.

programme.title: Gestapo: Hitler's Secret Police
programme.desc: Hermann Goering’s Secret State Police were tasked to arrest and torture confessions and information from supposed enemies of the Reich.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Building The Brand
programme.desc: Hitler’s fascination with propaganda was born in the trenches of the First World War. There he saw it emerge as a potent tool of psychological warfare - one that he would harness to build the Nazi movement. Witness Hitler's early propaganda tactics.

programme.title: Hitler's Propaganda Machine: Power and Persuasion
programme.desc: This episode explores Hitler's approach to propaganda in power; where persuasion was achieved through propaganda and terror, all in service of one goal: the creation of a state under one shared ideology. A new German power fueled by propaganda.

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: Mayday Air Disaster

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun
programme.desc: A Brighton couple host a yoga retreat at their Spanish apartments, a Bristol family hits a crisis when their UK house sale falls through, and gite owners in France are forced to drop their prices.

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: A New Life In The Sun

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: A sleepy Canadian town is devastated when a 74-car freight train derails downtown, killing dozens.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: A dropped socket wrench punctures a fuel tank, destroying a huge Titan II missile carrying a nuclear warhead.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: Italy's deadliest avalanche since 1916 hits Rigopiano. Five adults and four children are trapped in the ruins.

programme.title: Alive
programme.desc: Facing the elements and wildlife with no food or warmth, Eric LeMarque's story of survival is a miracle.

programme.title: Trapped
programme.desc: Without food, trapped on a mountain, these plane crash survivors must resort to the unthinkable.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In Naroom's forest, the kids are heading toward a giant obelisk, a structure which the Book of Elders says contains the Naroomi Dreamstone. On route, our trio are packing up camp when Tony starts having seeing things from his Earth life.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Responding to an urgent fan letter from a little boy who's country has been taken over by an evil dictator, Bends and the Sharks travel to "Chernozem" to free the boy's dad and topple the evil dictator.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Hollow
programme.desc: Playmaker must cut down Spectre’s defenses if he is to topple the Tower of Hanoi!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Edgar excitedly shows the posse his new telescope. He plans to use it to watch “Bailey’s Comet. ” It’s a brilliant comet streaking through the sky – making its closest pass to earth in nearly 60 million years.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: An A-R-C race in the heart of farm country brings Johnny home for the first time since joining the league.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Looking Back

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Drift
programme.desc: Thrust flees into the depths of Cybertron, pursued by Hot Shot and Wheeljack - and, separately, Starscream, who saves the children from being killed. The children discover the origins of the minicons.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Cluck of the Were-Chicken / Gnome Force

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Cramp
programme.desc: To convince Galvatron he must ally with Optimus to prevent Unicron taking over the universe, Starscream makes the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: The Brave Battler
programme.desc: With LINK VRAINS under attack, it’s up to the flashiest duelist ever to save the day – Shima!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All Aboard
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Pistachio - BJ Snack Attack
programme.desc: Barney is snacking on pistachios...and just can't seem to stop! His young friends try to help by hiding them from Barney. When that doesn't work, they tell him a story to help him stop eating pistachios.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A New Friend
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Hot! It's Cold!
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: After BJ loses everyone's tickets to the circus, he learns a valuable lesson about responsibility. Baby Bop discovers a lonely little flower struggling to grow in a shady spot.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When some of the children in the park invite Barney to join them for a race./When BJ starts to feel sick after eating too many sweets, he lies down in hopes of feeling better.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on Trial
programme.desc: While the Turtles go on a talk show to prove their innocence to the world, Krang steals a robot and some Solarbenite from a military warehouse, with the intention of destroying the Turtles himself.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the 50-Foot Irma
programme.desc: While the Turtles are planning Irma's birthday party, Shredder steals an Exaboron Isotope from a meteorite crash. Krang creates an Exaboron-powered Enlarging Ray which causes six times normal growth, with the intention of using it on Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Maltese Hamster
programme.desc: Shredder gives futuristic laser weapons to mobster Tony Vivaldi and his underlings. Shredder wants to find the Maltese Hamster statue of him, which has inside it the formula for ultimate fuel for the Technodrome.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sky Turtles
programme.desc: Krang creates a Gravity Altering Device which causes everyone in the city, including the Turtles, to start floating.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Old Switcheroo
programme.desc: Two huge electrodes at Cybertech Labs produce a startling effect on two long-time foes. The mind of the Turtles master Splinter winds up in the body of the evil Shredder - and vice versa, causing confusion among their associates.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Burne's Blues
programme.desc: Burne is out to prove to April that he can still dig in the trenches and find good stories after deriding her for failing to come up with anything good lately.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Fifth Turtle
programme.desc: On the occasion of a rare conjunction of the Earth, Moon, and Stars, Shredder steals some Capsidium Crystals.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Rat King
programme.desc: April does a story on the rat problem the city is facing, and the Rat King kidnaps her. The Rat King is the leader of all the rats under his form of government known as the Ratocracy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles at the Earth's Core
programme.desc: The Turtles venture down to the Earth's core and discover a lost prehistoric world complete with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Foolish
programme.desc: Emperor Aleister and his daughter Princess Mallory arrive from the small kingdom of Malacuria where there has been a recent discovery of a vast deposit of Lydium - 90, the most powerful source of energy found on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Big MACC
programme.desc: At an army testing lab where a super laser is being demonstrated, the crowd is surprised by the arrival of MACC, a robot from the year 2399 that talks like a cowboy from watching old western movies on inter-dimensional trips.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The theme for the seven remaining cast mates is spy films. Firstly they have to evade lasers to escape from a building, and Jason is injured. Then they must defuse stink bombs.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The latest challenge requires the remaining contestants to invent their own super-hero, and even make their own costumes. Then they must walk across a power line during a meteor shower.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: Owen, Heather and Leshawna are greeted by Bridgette and Geoff, who welcome their guests with unreleased videos, behind-the-scenes intrusions, revelation of gossip and unconventional interviews.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The movie genre which provides this week's theme is fairy tales, and the contestants have to rescue a fairy princess. Their first challenge is to walk across a rope bridge.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The contestants' next challenge has mystery movies as a theme. They have to solve the clues and follow the trail to solve the crime.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: It's announced that Owen is returning to the show, but the contestants don't know he's been bribed to stir up trouble. The theme of the new challenge is rock 'n' roll biopics.

programme.title: Total Drama Action
programme.desc: The latest challenge involves the boys competing against the girls at kung fu. They also have to brew tea at the top of a mountain for a kung fu master.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku and his friends confront Goku Black and Zamasu in the future. Black reveals that he is actually the present-day Zamasu, who used the Super Dragon Balls to switch bodies with Goku.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Fighting rages on and things are looking grim for the heroes, they might not be able to win, but Future Trunks can at least defend the others while they escape.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: With Majin Buu defeated, Goku has taken a completely new role as a farmer. Now, with Earth at peace, our heroes have settled into normal lives.

programme.title: Dragon Ball Super
programme.desc: Goku Black realises he can harness his anger to become more powerful. Zamasu is shocked by Goku Black's power display.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash seeks the Cascade Badge in Cerulean City—but for some reason, Misty doesn’t want to join him.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: After earning his second badge, Ash sets off triumphantly for Vermilion City. Along the way, he hears of AJ, a Trainer on the brink of 100 straight victories. Full of confidence, Ash challenges this fearsome Trainer!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash meets some students, who are bullying their classmate Joe. Joe insists the rough treatment is necessary so he’ll be strong enough to graduate. Ash doesn’t agree.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Completely lost, our heroes reach a village not shown on their map. This quiet place is inhabited by Pokémon that have been injured in battle or abandoned by their Trainers.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: As our heroes press on toward Vermilion City, they encounter an injured Charmander, sitting atop a stone on a mountain pass. They later find out why it is waiting there.

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash and his friends walk along a path and fall into a hole dug by a group of mischievous Squirtle. Why is the Squirtle Squad such a menace to the local population?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: The party meets Bill, a Pokémon researcher who is waiting in his lighthouse for the coming of a one-of-a-kind Pokémon, never before seen by humans. Could such a Pokémon truly exist?

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Eager to earn a badge, Ash challenges Lt. Surge. Pikachu reluctantly enters the battle, only to discover that its opponent is a Raichu, a fierce Pokémon with tremendous electric power—and the evolved form of Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: Ash and his friends board the cruise ship St. Anne, thanks to tickets provided by Jessie and James in disguise. Their latest plan is to lure Pokémon Trainers onto the ship and steal their Pokémon!

programme.title: Pokemon: Indigo League
programme.desc: A powerful storm forces everyone except Team Rocket and our heroes to abandon the sinking St. Anne. Ash, Brock, and Misty must team up with their enemies to survive this sticky situation!

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children hanging out their washing. Tinky Winky, Laa-Laa and Po are out walking together when a clothes line appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa is playing indoors with her ball, the Noo Noo catches it and tidies it up. Laa-Laa chases the Noo Noo till she gets her ball back.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children learn about the number three. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa go for a walk. They count three trees and three flowers and Po follows behind counting too.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet brings a message for Dipsy and Laa-Laa which makes them laugh and run away. The Teletubbies watch some children dancing with King Pleasure and the Biscuit Boys.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po wants some Tubby Custard, but she doesn' t have time to eat is before watching some children do some painting in the garden. The Tubbies are very careful not to spill their Tubby Custard, but if they do, the Noo Noo will tidy up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are feeling very happy. They run and dance around cheering and hugging. They stop to watch some children in South Africa looking at monkeys.

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Thomas and Jack having fun playing on the beach and building sandcastles. In Teletubbyland the Teletubbies are going round and round.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A little girl uses different things to stick a face onto a pumpkin. A pumpkin appears in Teletubbyland. It has two ears, a nose, two eyes and a big smile.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make models of heads out of clay. Dipsy is very pleased with himself when he discovers his eyes, mouth, nose and ears.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Warlock of Nu Theta Phi

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Under the Ice
